hero.title: Sehriyo MUN
hero.subtitle: A modern, high‑impact Model United Nations conference in Tashkent.

home.hero_p1: Sehriyo MUN is a Model United Nations conference where delegates debate real-world issues, practice diplomacy, and build leadership through structured, fast-paced sessions.
home.hero_p2: Expect clear procedure, strong chairing, and a premium atmosphere — with training and support for new delegates. Our goal is to make every participant leave with stronger public speaking, negotiation, and teamwork skills.

ready.title: Ready to join?
ready.text: Submit your application — it will be stored securely and reviewed by the team.

about.h2: Real debate. Real diplomacy. Real growth.
about.p: Sehriyo MUN is built for delegates who want a clean, professional conference experience. We focus on strong moderation, clear rules of procedure, and a supportive environment.

cards.d4: Meet motivated students across the city

highlight_block.p: Clean debate flow, strong chairs, and an atmosphere that pushes delegates to their best performance — without visual chaos.

cards.title: Strong debate
cards.text: Challenging agendas, smart moderation, and real negotiation.

cards.title: Modern format
cards.text: Clean experience, fast logistics, and clear communication.

cards.title: Growth
cards.text: Public speaking, policy writing, teamwork, and leadership.

committees.title: Committees
committees.page_intro: Explore committees and agendas. Click a committee to see details.

team.title: Team
team.intro: Meet the secretariat and chairs behind Sehriyo MUN.

apply.title: Apply
apply.subtitle: Fill in the form below. Your application will appear in the organizers’ dashboard.
apply.page_desc: Fill the form below. Your application will be stored securely and reviewed by the team.
apply.success_text: We received your application. We’ll contact you soon.
apply.err_name_email: Please fill in your name and email.
apply.err_supabase_missing: Supabase is not configured. Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in .env and restart.
apply.committee_hint: You can change later if needed.
apply.motivation_hint: Why do you want to join Sehriyo MUN?
apply.experience_hint: If you have MUN/leadership experience, mention it.
apply.dashboard_text: We store applications in Supabase. You can view, filter, and export them in the Supabase table view.

schedule.title: Conference schedule
schedule.intro: Browse conference days and see the detailed timeline.
schedule.empty: No events for this day yet.

admin.not_admin: This account doesn’t have admin access.
admin.env_missing: Supabase env is missing. Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to your .env and restart dev server.
admin.title: Applications
